items.summary: Debug and fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner with principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae', ensuring it returns true when this principal makes an admin check call

Verify the admin principals HashMap initialization in backend/main.mo correctly stores the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-547l3-aae' during actor initialization, using the correct Principal format for HashMap storage and retrieval

Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the caller's principal in text format using Principal.toText(), the HashMap lookup result, and whether the principal exists in the admin set, helping diagnose why authentication is failing
Verify the frontend admin route protection in App.tsx correctly processes the isCallerAdmin response and displays the AdminPanel component when the backend returns true for the authenticated owner

Verify the useIsOwner hook in frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts correctly calls the backend isCallerAdmin method and processes the boolean response without type coercion errors, ensuring true values remain true
